description_long: This house is a modern, multi-story residential building with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a combination of white and gray surfaces, large windows, and two prominent garage doors at street level. The sides of the house are bordered by low walls enclosing green lawn areas, while the rear showcases a more private garden space and a symmetrical arrangement of windows. The roof is flat with multiple levels and cutouts, likely for skylights or rooftop terraces. The overall design emphasizes straight lines, minimal ornamentation, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and gray surfaces, featuring garages and enclosed green spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two garage doors, large windows, and a central entryway with planters above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, layered structure, and enclosed green lawn areas.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical windows and a private garden area, lacking garage doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same flat roof and green lawn enclosures as the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a modern door, flanked by large windows and planters above, no porch or columns, and direct access from the street.
